comment: Computer-scope (user-global) addition: Kimi K 2.6 on Cerebras Inference. Uses the built-in 'cerebras' provider. Set CEREBRAS_API_KEY or run /login cerebras. Hot-reloads on /model.

models.name: Kimi K 2.6 (Cerebras)
models.comment: Moonshot Kimi-K2.6 via Cerebras Inference (https://inference-docs.cerebras.ai). Fast dedicated inference. Verify exact 'id' and specs in your Cerebras dashboard / model catalog. Adjust cost/context if the dedicated endpoint uses different values.
